ref: and asked her to sleep with him. She asked, “What will you give me if I do?”
text: Ʋ bɩ jɩŋ arɩ ʋ bii-haala nɛ ŋɩɩ, ŋɩɩ nɛ ʋ mʋ ʋ teeŋ a bʋla pʋ, “Leŋ dɩ mɩ kɛnɩŋ pɩŋ.” Ŋɩɩ nɛ tolo-la pɩɛsɛ, “Bɛɛ kʋŋ nɛ ŋ jaŋ pɩmɛ?”
translated: I have come from my home to this place, because I have arrived here to do something, 'I will go to the place where I am needed.' They asked me, 'Why are you going to that place?'

ref: Although Abraham was very old, Sarah had a son exactly at the time God had said.
text: Ʋ kɛŋ luoruŋ a lʋl hambolibie a pɩ Abɩraham bʋa-la tɩtɩa lɛ Wɩa fa sɩ daga arɩ ʋ jaŋ lʋl, dɩ Abɩraham hɩɛsa.
translated: When Abraham went to the place where they were staying, he went to Titia in Wia to ask him, and Abraham answered.

ref: He had three sons: Shem, Ham, and Japheth.
text: Nowa fa lʋl hambolibiisiŋ batori nɛ, ba yɩraa nɛ Sɛm, Ham arɩ Jafɛf.
translated: Noah from the lineage of Hambolibiisiŋ, the people, it is said, through Sem, Ham, and Japheth.

ref: They answered, “We now know for certain that the Lord is with you, and we have decided there needs to be a peace treaty between you and us. So let's make a solemn agreement
text: Ŋɩɩ nɛ ba bʋl, “La na arɩ La TƖƖNA chɩŋ ŋ harɩŋ nɛ woruŋ. Ŋɩɩ nɛ laa chɛ dɩ la bil niiŋ la dɩŋ pɛgɛ, a ŋmɩɛsa pɩ dɔŋɔ
translated: We have come together to thank the Lord for our unity. We must continue to work together and support each other to achieve our goals, and let us all join hands.

ref: She also covered the smooth part of his hands and neck with goatskins
text: a paa bʋ-tenniŋ a vɔɔ ʋ nɩsaa arɩ ʋ baŋŋaa sɩ ŋaa mʋla mʋla lɛ.
translated: He went there to the village and did it very much.

ref: God said, “Now we will make humans, and they will be like us. We will let them rule the fish, the birds, and all other living creatures.”
text: Ŋɩɩ nɛ Wɩa bɩra bʋl, “Leŋ dɩ la ŋaa nuhuobiine dɩ ʋ nagɛla, a leŋ dɩ ʋ tɩɩ chenfile-la sɩ hɛ mʋgʋ-balɩŋ tʋɔŋ arɩ fille-la kala sɩ hɛ wɩa-nyuŋ arɩ pʋsʋ-la kala sɩ hɛ tinteeŋ arɩ tintee-tuuroo kala.”
translated: “I say to you, Wia, listen carefully: The path we have walked is not easy, and the way we have chosen, because of the heavy burdens we carry, the words we have raised, and the truth we have upheld.”

ref: Noah did everything God told him to do.
text: Ŋɩɩ nɛ Nowa ŋaa wɩalɩŋ kala Wɩa sɩ sɩ ʋ ŋaa.
translated: I went with Nowa to come to the place where we came.

ref: Then he asked God, “Why not let Ishmael inherit what you have promised me?”
text: Ŋɩɩ nɛ Abɩraham bʋla pɩ Wɩa, “Dɩ ŋ nɛ jaŋ pɛ Ɩsɩmɛl lɛ.”
translated: Then Abraham said to God, "Here is my son Ishmael."

ref: After Joseph was born, Jacob said to Laban, “Release me from our agreement and let me return to my own country.
text: Rakɛl sɩ lʋl Josɛf ʋ harɩŋ lɛ, Jekɔb bʋla pɩ Labaŋ, “Tamɛ dɩ mɩ mɩɩra mʋ mɩ jaŋ.
translated: Rachel said to Joseph, "Here you are, Jacob." Jacob said to Labaŋ, "Bring my son here immediately."

ref: But you have promised that I would be a success and that someday it will be as hard to count my descendants as it is to count the grains of sand along the seashore.

ref: Who would have dared to tell Abraham that someday I would have a child? But in his old age, I have given him a son.”
text: Ʋ bɩra bʋl, “Kʋbɛɛ nɛ fa jaŋ wuo bʋla pɩ Abɩraham arɩ mɩ-na Sara jaŋ lʋl bie a kɛŋ yɩlɩŋ pʋ dɩ ʋ wasɛ? Ama ʋ hɩɛsa ŋɩɩ nɛ aŋ ka mɩ lʋl bie pʋ.” Ba kiri Haga arɩ Ɩsɩmɛl ta
translated: Abraham said, 'Indeed, you have given this servant woman to me. Now she has treated me with contempt. Please, may the Lord judge between you and me!' But Abraham said to Sarah, 'Your servant is in your power; deal with her as you see fit.' So Sarah dealt harshly with her, and the servant fled from her face.

ref: “But, brother, I already have plenty,” Esau replied. “Keep them for yourself.”
text: Ŋɩɩ nɛ Ɛsɔ bʋl, “Mɩ sɩ kɛŋ kɩalɩŋ, ba maga nɛ mɩ naambii, ŋ ma kɛŋ ŋ kɩaa.”
translated: "I say to the people, 'I have come to know, but my heart is not yet satisfied, I cannot yet understand.'"

ref: When the man saw that he could not win, he struck Jacob on the hip and threw it out of joint.
text: Baal-la sɩ na dɩ ʋ bɩ Jekɔb wuo, ʋ yi ʋ kɛrɛ lɛ, kɛrɩ-sɩɩŋ lɩɩ.
translated: Baal-la came with him and was with Jacob there; he spoke to him, inquiring there.

ref: Wherever you go, I will watch over you, then later I will bring you back to this land. I won't leave you—I will do all I have promised.
text: Bee-na, mɩ chɩŋ ŋ harɩŋ nɛ aa beniŋ lee-la kala ŋ sɩɩ mʋ. Mɩ jaŋ kɛnɩŋ mɩɩra kɔ tinteeŋ deeŋ. Mɩ bɩ jaŋ leŋiŋ, see mɩ sɩ ŋaa wɩɩ-la mɩ sɩ sɩ mɩ jaŋ ŋaa pɩŋ.”
translated: Indeed, my heart and thoughts are such that I must speak clearly so you may understand. My words are meant for true guidance. My speech is sincere; I want you to know my true words are for you.

ref: Although Abraham was very old, Sarah had a son exactly at the time God had said.
text: Ʋ kɛŋ luoruŋ a lʋl hambolibie a pɩ Abɩraham bʋa-la tɩtɩa lɛ Wɩa fa sɩ daga arɩ ʋ jaŋ lʋl, dɩ Abɩraham hɩɛsa.
